user.title: Set up APstorage BLE
user.description: Click Submit to scan for nearby APstorage ELT-12 PCS devices. Make sure the device is powered on and in Bluetooth range.

manual.title: Enter MAC address
manual.description: Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your APstorage ELT-12 PCS (e.g., AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF).

bluetooth_confirm.title: APstorage PCS discovered
bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up **{name}**?

error.invalid_address: Invalid Bluetooth MAC address format. Use the format AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF.

abort.no_devices_found: No APstorage PCS devices found in Bluetooth range.
